notes: Warzone → season lookup table. LWS runs each warzone on its own timeline (merged servers advance at different rates), so 'current season' is a per-warzone attribute, not a global one. This is a CROWDSOURCED best-effort snapshot — end-users can override via the warzone selector in every tool. If a warzone isn't in this table, the tool asks the user to set it manually.

2007.notes: Owner's own warzone. Merged bucket including KR alliances. Confirmed 2026-07-15 by TINO/RONY R5.

kr-mixed.notes: Korean-market warzones tend to launch S2 ~2 weeks ahead of NA/EU

na-mixed.notes: NA warzones on standard First Fun release cadence

eu-mixed.notes: EU warzones typically 1-3 days after NA

latam-mixed.notes: LATAM warzones follow their own late-merge cycle

cn-mixed.notes: Chinese-market warzones (逆战:世界大战) may have region-locked events
